_comment: Copilot CLI conformance hooks (advisory, fail-open). If the `conformance` binary is unavailable or errors, hooks exit 0 with an empty JSON object so editing is not blocked. Set CONFORMANCE_CATALOGUE_ROOT to the quality-software catalogue. See integration/README.md.

sessionStart.command: /bin/sh -lc 'if command -v conformance >/dev/null 2>&1; then conformance hook session-start || printf "{}"; else printf "{}"; fi'

postToolUse.command: /bin/sh -lc 'if command -v conformance >/dev/null 2>&1; then conformance hook post-write || printf "{}"; else printf "{}"; fi'

agentStop.command: /bin/sh -lc 'if command -v conformance >/dev/null 2>&1; then conformance hook turn-end || printf "{}"; else printf "{}"; fi'
